properties.label: Chest Plate of the North
properties.description: Layered steel from northern wardens, scarred by every frostbitten rake of a Pritscher claw.

properties.label: Leather Armor
properties.description: Supple hide stitched by Nouraajd's tannery guild for scouts slipping between alleys.

properties.label: Plate Armor
properties.description: Standard issue harness from Mayor Irvin's barracks, dented by years of holding the town gates.

properties.label: Robe
properties.description: Threadbare robe worn by Father Beren's acolytes, its hem darkened by incense soot and grave-dust.
